summary: PW vs SI Multi-Method Comparison Feature - All tests pass. Backend: 15/15 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - PW vs SI comparison table with 3 methods, BEST badge on TrueSkill, per-model breakdown cards, SI Rating Calibration section with narrative.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PW vs SI multi-method comparison feature fully tested. The /api/si-rating-stats endpoint returns pw_vs_si object with overall array (3 methods: win_rate, bt, trueskill) and per_model dict (claude, gpt, gemini). bt_vs_si backward compatibility maintained. Frontend renders at /correlation route with data-testid='pw-vs-si-section', 'si-model-comparison', 'pw-vs-si-claude', 'pw-vs-si-gpt', 'pw-vs-si-gemini'.

test_cases: Returns pw_vs_si object with overall array and per_model dict
pw_vs_si.overall contains 3 entries: win_rate, bt, trueskill
Each overall entry has spearman_rho, kendall_tau, pearson_r, n, method, label
pw_vs_si.per_model has claude, gpt, gemini keys
Each per_model entry has label and rows array with 3 methods
pw_vs_si.n_matches is present and positive (64758 matches)
bt_vs_si backward compatibility maintained (first overall entry)
TrueSkill has highest Spearman correlation (0.7002)
model_comparison exists for SI calibration section
Section visible at data-testid='pw-vs-si-section'
Overall table shows 3 rows (Win-Rate, BT, TrueSkill)
BEST badge displayed on TrueSkill row (highest Spearman ρ)
Table columns: PW Estimator, Spearman ρ, Kendall τ, Pearson r, n
Claude card at data-testid='pw-vs-si-claude'
GPT card at data-testid='pw-vs-si-gpt'
Gemini card at data-testid='pw-vs-si-gemini'
Each card shows 3 PW methods with ρ, τ, n values
Section visible at data-testid='si-model-comparison'
Table shows Model, Mean, σ, Range, Avg Inter-ρ, Papers
Calibration gap narrative explains mean differences
Implication text explains why pairwise tournament is better
All Models button visible and clickable
Claude button visible and clickable
GPT button visible and clickable
Gemini button visible and clickable
